title: The Stablecoin Future, Milei's Memecoin, DOGE for the DoD, Grok 3, Why Stripe Stays Private
description:
(0:00) The Besties welcome John and Patrick Collison!

(4:28) Stripe's business evolution: $1T in volume/year, stablecoins, challenging the Visa/Mastercard duopoly, publishing economic indicators

(20:31) Jamie Dimon's leaked rant on remote work and bureaucracy

(34:22) DOGE for Defense: Trump ordered the Pentagon to look at cutting the defense budget by 8%/year over the next five years

(43:51) Crypto Corner: Milei's Memecoin embarrassment

(1:00:18) John and Patrick break down the Arc Institute and its new Evo 2 AI model

(1:18:04) Grok 3 takes the LLM lead, lessons learned from Elon's Colossus scale up

(1:30:22) Science Corner: Asteroid update

(1:35:42) Why Stripe hasn't gone public yet, despite great metrics

analysis.summary: The episode covers various topics including Stripe's business evolution, stablecoins, and the potential use of DOGE for the US Department of Defense. The Collison brothers also discuss the Arc Institute and its new Evo 2 AI model. Additionally, the episode touches on Grok 3, asteroid updates, and why Stripe hasn't gone public yet.

takeaways.text: DOGE might be used for US defense budget
Stripe stays private despite great metrics
Arc Institute introduces Evo 2 AI model
Elon's Colossus scale up provides lessons

sentiment.notes: The episode has a positive tone, with discussions on innovative technologies and potential solutions for various industries.

notable_moments.description: DOGE for US defense budget discussion starts
Arc Institute's Evo 2 AI model discussion starts
